composition.currentLayout: HostCreateEventRouteState resolves route club loading/error/not-found/ready branches before HostCreateEventRouteScreen renders CreateEventScreen. CreateEventWizardStep owns canonical step order, titles, form-key spec construction, and schedule-validation metadata. CreateEventWizardValidationPlan owns current form-key selection and schedule validation policy. CreateEventDraftSnapshot owns draft dirty-tracking signature and EventDraft serialization. CreateEventDraftRestoreState owns EventDraft-to-form restore mapping, stale enum fallback, restored schedule text, location restore state, policy restore state, and restored Event Success defaults. CreateEventDraftSideEffectState owns draft-check, picker visibility, picker delete intent, and post-submit delete intent policy. CreateEventScreen keeps form-controller assignment, PageController movement, platform picker execution, controller mutation triggers, and Navigator/context side effects inline.
